string 2: You're human... Yes, I knew a human would come eventually.

So even humans can feel the energy of this place... I knew
you were a dangerous lot.

Man, I dunno what you saw in the human world, but aren't you
being a little too negative?
You wouldn't understand.

There's a human right here. Talk to them and see what
they're like for yourself.
...Goodbye.
Are humans really that dangerous?

I wanna see the human world and decide for myself if it's
actually dangerous!

So, can you take me somewhere so I'll be able to understand
humans better?
{next}Sure. I know a place.
{next}Humans aren't dangerous.
{end}Sorry. I can't right now.
Yay! Thanks! You humans sure are nice!

Well, maybe not you, but I still need to see the human world
before I can say for sure!

Not right now? Okay. I'll be waiting, so let me know when
you have some spare time!

Hey! I need to see the human world as soon as possible! Now
can you take me?
{next}Sure. Sorry for the wait.
{end}Sorry. I'm still pretty busy.
Yay! All right, let's get going, then!

I see... That's too bad. Please let me know when you're able
to take me there.
Okay! Let's go see the human world together!

Oh, that reminds me. I imagine I'll stick out like a sore
thumb looking like this.
Give me just a second!

Thanks for waiting! Well, what do you think? Pretty good,
right?
Okay, let's go!
Wow! Look at all of the restaurants here!

Like they say, the best way to know a culture and its people
is through food!

There's too much to choose from. I need you to recommend
something for me!
Spicy ramen.
{next}Super-sweet ice cream.
Well, what kind of food do you like?

You mean "spicy" as in "hot"? Sorry. I'm not really a fan of
such foods. Anything else?!

Super-sweet? Like super-duper sweet? That sounds perfect!
I'll take it!
Let's get moving already! I can barely wait!

I don't like anything spicy or tingly. I like food that
melts on the tongue!
So this is super-sweet ice cream... It sure looks beautiful!
It's also strangely cold! How can food even get this cold?
Okay, I'll give it a try... *chomp* Hmm...!
{next}You're smiling.
{next}Do you like it?
{next}Hey, you shouldn't eat it so fast...

Hehehe... I didn't mean to smile. Once I tasted this thing,
I couldn't help myself!

Of course I do! It's delicious! I don't think I'll be able
to stop eating it!

*chomp, chomp* Hm? Ow... My head hurts all of a sudden! But
I can't stop eating it, either!
This is absolutely delicious! I think I love human food!

I learned about humans. Let's go back to the sanctuary so I
can speak in my original form.

It's not just sweet. It has depth to it, too, as the hint of
salt brings out the sweetness!

I've learned a lot from this amazing food! I must do what I
can to defend humanity!

Thanks to the delicious food, I was able to return to my
original form!

I shall use my strength to protect everyone. I appreciate
this wisdom you have given me!

I shall go to the mines to hone myself and my armor. Oh,
this is to thank you for the food.
Ow... My head hurts... Water... I need water...
{next}I'll buy some water from a vending machine.
{next}Do you need some medicine?
{next}We need an ambulance here!

Water? Th-Thanks! Phew! It's delicious! I like these vending
machines.

No, it's not from like a cold or headache... It was the
overwhelming nature of that food.
N-No, don't! They'll find out I'm not actually human!

A friend told me about this ice cream, but it was too sweet
and made my head hurt.

I was really looking forward to trying it, but it wasn't
what I expected at all.

Is all human food like that? If you know anything even
tastier, you've gotta tell me!
{next}Spicy ramen.
Do you want to go for super-sweet again?
Well, what kind of food do you like?

Spicy ramen? The kind that lingers on the tongue? I
absolutely love that kind of food!

Is the restaurant nearby? Okay, let's get going, already! I
can't wait!

No way! Forget it! Just thinking about it... Ow... How about
something else?

I don't like things that are too sweet. I want something
that shocks the taste buds!

So this is spicy ramen...? Yep, I can already tell how spicy
it is from the steam alone.
Okay, I'll give it a try!
*slurp* Hm? Ohhh! Th-This is...
{next}Good?
{next}The hottest spices in the world?
{next}Blurt it out, already!
No, it's suuuuuper good! *slurp* I can't stop eating it!

These are the hottest spices in the human world? It's
pleasantly mild. I like it!
Mmm... It's... delicious!
*slurp* Thank you so much! That was great!

All finished? Okay, here is your change. Thank you for
coming in!

What was that you received just now? Oh, so these are called
"coins"?

They're also made of metal. I wonder if I could use them to
repair my armor...
{next}You aren't Magnamon?
{next}Your armor needs repair?
{next}Is something the matter?
{next}We don't use coins very much anymore.

You're mistaking me for someone else. I'm the Veemon that
isn't Magnamon. Confusing, no?

Therefore, I need to repair my armor for when I'm not in
this particular form.

Yes, it does. It's time I repaired my armor for when I'm not
in this particular form.

Both me and my armor are in pretty bad shape, but that spicy
kick has me feeling better!

Hmm. Cashless payments, huh? But I guess that means coins
are now precious metals!
Hm? You're giving me these coins? Thanks!

This won't be enough for the repairs, though. I'll just have
to keep collecting coins.

Once I have enough coins, I might be able to use them
instead of Chrondigizoit!
It's hard work collecting coins. *sigh* I'm getting hungry.
{next}Can I buy you some spicy ramen?
{end}Well, good luck with that. See you later!
Oh, seriously?! I'll definitely take you up on that offer!
Let's go eat! Come on. I'm starving, here!
Yeah, I'll keep at it for now. Bye!

All finished? Okay, here is your change. Thank you for
coming in!

Thanks! Oh, you're giving me your change, too? Hooray!
That's more for my collection!

Still, I know I won't be able to repair my armor with just
these coins alone.

It doesn't look like I'll be able to use them in place of
Blue Digizoit after all.
Don't give up!
So why do you keep collecting coins, then?
{next}Yeah, Blue Digizoit might be tough...
Yeah, you're right. Once I give up, my quest will be over.

I guess I'll keep collecting coins around here and then hit
up some ramen shops. Later!

Honestly, I can't stop eating that spicy ramen. That might
be why I'm still at it.

I can't think of anything else, so I'll keep at it for just
a bit longer. See you later!
Wait... Do you know something about some Blue Digizoit?
You must tell me at once!
I see... So, Neptunemon's weapon is made of Blue Digizoit?!

Okay! There's hope for me after all! Everything's gonna work
out!

Once I have repaired my armor, I shall be better equipped to
help everyone!

Thank you for everything. I shall head to the Abyss
Sanctuary now!

This is my way of thanking you for all the meals you bought
me. Until we meet again!
I'll keep working on my coin collection!
Veemon finished eating and returned to the sanctuary.
